name: tree-api-server
description: Production-ready HTTP API for managing hierarchical tree data structures

scripts.test: npm run build && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test node --test dist/test/tree.test.js dist/test/retry.test.js dist/test/metrics.test.js dist/test/transaction.test.js dist/test/idempotency.test.js dist/test/errors.test.js dist/test/schema.test.js
scripts.test:watch: npm run build && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test node --test --watch dist/test/tree.test.js dist/test/retry.test.js dist/test/metrics.test.js dist/test/transaction.test.js dist/test/idempotency.test.js dist/test/errors.test.js dist/test/schema.test.js
scripts.test:bun: npm run build && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test bun test dist/test/tree.test.js && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test bun test dist/test/retry.test.js && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test bun test dist/test/metrics.test.js && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test bun test dist/test/transaction.test.js && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test bun test dist/test/idempotency.test.js && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test bun test dist/test/errors.test.js && DB_PATH=:memory: NODE_ENV=test bun test dist/test/schema.test.js
scripts.db:reset: rm -f data/trees.db && npm run build && node dist/scripts/init-db.js
